treatment_information.treatment_response: Creatinine had decreased to 1.7 by discharge.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient underwent a deceased donor kidney transplant.
Patient developed a urine leak requiring placement of a percutaneous nephrostomy tube.
Patient returned for revision of the ureterovesicular anastomosis with stent placement.
Patient underwent biopsy of the allograft; no evidence of rejection was found.

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient doing well at home, no complaints.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient instructed to call the transplant clinic for concerning symptoms; lab work scheduled every ___ and ___ as arranged by the transplant clinic.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient feels well, pain improved, requiring minimal opioid pain medication, voiding without assistance, tolerating regular diet.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reports no blood in urine and normal bowel movements; has been adhering to medications.
